name: ask-chatgpt
owns: <this entire repo>: src/ (or package dir), tests/, scripts/, docs/, orchestration/, tmp/, README.md, pyproject.toml
ground_truth: README.md spec acceptance executed green end-to-end via reproducible commands (uv run pytest + scripted acceptance against the local mock-ChatGPT fixture), verified from inspected command output and produced artifacts — never from log claims or exit codes alone; real-chatgpt.com halves are operator-run from runbooks

shared_resources.chatgpt_account_and_quota: operator-owned; default test tier consumes ZERO quota (loopback mock); real-site automation permitted per D-002 (operator consent 2026-06-12): opt-in real_site tier, human-paced with a lightweight audit log (NO hard message cap — corrected 2026-06-12; never programmatically spam), headed on operator's signed-in profile, login never automated
shared_resources.pi_workers: NO hard concurrency cap (operator correction 2026-06-12; the old 'max 3' was an unverified spawn-config claim — launcher enforces nothing). Bound parallelism by judgement: single-editor rule for shared-tree mutations, genuinely disjoint work only, machine practicality.
shared_resources.shared_agent_venv: ~/.local/share/agent-python/.venv is READ-ONLY infra; this repo's deps live in its own uv project
shared_resources.archive_read_only: /home/abhmul/Documents/weak-simplex-conjecture — NEVER write; read control-plane/ + orchestration/ for prior art
